  \$g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage(\$newImg)

  \$g.CompositingQuality = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.CompositingQuality]::HighQuality
  \$g.DrawImage(\$img, 0, 0, \$w, \$h)
  \$g.Dispose()
  \$img.Dispose()
  \$tmpPath = (Resolve-Path '.').Path + '\\' + \$file + '.tmp.png'
  \$newImg.Save(\$tmpPath, [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png)
  \$newImg.Dispose()
  Move-Item -Path \$tmpPath -Destination (Resolve-Path \$src).Path -Force
  Write-Host (\"{0,-42} resized to {1}x{2}\" -f \$file, \$w, \$h)
}
"
